hook.summary: First-person poker all-in with pocket Aces against Simpsons-like characters.
hook.visual_action: The player pushes a large stack of red and green chips into the center of the table.
hook.voiceover_transcript: All in! Oh no, damn it!

scene_flow: First-person POV of a poker game where the player goes all-in with pocket Aces.
Opponent characters react dramatically to the high-stakes move with exaggerated expressions.
The player loses the hand and expresses frustration as their chips are swept away.
Final title card reveal for 'Hold'em or Fold'em' in a professional tournament setting.
audience_proxy: Adult fans of poker and classic animated sitcoms looking for a casual competitive card game.
